title: Playground Series s6e5 — OOF / test artifacts
subtitle: Stacking pool OOF + test predictions for F1 PitNextLap (private)
description:
Derived numpy artifacts for the playground-series-s6e5 stacking pipeline: K=27 PRIMARY pool (K=21 + v4 + h1d + d16 + d18 + E2 + F2), HEDGE-eligible candidates (d15b, d13e, d15c, d15d, K22_d12meta, d18 trail), and Path-B hier-meta variants. Files map 1:1 onto scripts/artifacts/*.npy in the project repo. Comp data (train/test) is NOT included per Kaggle TOS; only derived predictions.

Schema: oof_<NAME>_strat.npy, test_<NAME>_strat.npy. Loaded by scripts/probe_min_meta.py via the K21_BASES list.

Versioning: each session-end wrap-up appends a version note 'YYYY-MM-DD <branch> +<probe>'.
